scripts.start: npm run build && npm start --prefix server
scripts.dev: npx -y concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.desktop:install: cd desktop && npm install && npm run postinstall
scripts.desktop:dev: npm run build && cd desktop && npx electron .
scripts.desktop:build:mac: npm run build && cd server && npx -y electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3 -e ../desktop/node_modules/electron && cd ../desktop && npx electron-builder --mac
scripts.desktop:build:win: npm run build && cd server && npx -y electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3 -e ../desktop/node_modules/electron && cd ../desktop && npx electron-builder --win
scripts.desktop:build:all: npm run build && cd server && npx -y electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3 -e ../desktop/node_modules/electron && cd ../desktop && npx electron-builder --mac --win
